all.en: I had just downloaded a new dating app last weekend out of curiosity.
all.zh: 上個週末我出於好奇剛下載了一款新的交友軟體。

all.en: After swiping for an hour, I finally matched with someone named Daniel.
all.zh: 滑了一小時後，我終於和一位叫丹尼爾的人配對成功。

all.en: His profile said he loved hiking, jazz music, and homemade pasta.
all.zh: 他的個人檔案寫著他熱愛健行、爵士樂和手工義大利麵。

all.en: I sent him a simple hello and asked about his favorite trail.
all.zh: 我傳了一句簡單的哈囉，並問他最喜歡的健行路線。

all.en: He replied within minutes, which made me feel more confident.
all.zh: 他幾分鐘內就回覆了，讓我覺得更有信心。

all.en: We chatted about our hometowns and our jobs for almost two hours.
all.zh: 我們聊了將近兩個小時，談到家鄉和工作。

all.en: He seemed polite, funny, and not too eager to ask for personal details.
all.zh: 他似乎有禮貌又風趣，也沒有急著問私人細節。

all.en: At the end, he suggested grabbing coffee at a quiet café downtown.
all.zh: 最後他提議去市中心一家安靜的咖啡廳喝杯咖啡。

all.en: I said yes but chose a public place to feel safe.
all.zh: 我答應了，但選了一個公共場所讓自己比較安心。

all.en: After we said goodnight, I sat smiling at my phone for a while.
all.zh: 互道晚安後，我對著手機微笑了好一陣子。

all.en: Maybe online dating was not as scary as I had imagined.
all.zh: 也許網路交友並沒有我想像中那麼可怕。

all.en: On Saturday afternoon, I arrived at the café fifteen minutes earlier than planned.
all.zh: 星期六下午，我比約定時間提早十五分鐘抵達咖啡廳。

all.en: Daniel walked in wearing a navy sweater and a slightly nervous, friendly smile.
all.zh: 丹尼爾走進來，穿著深藍色毛衣，臉上帶著一絲緊張卻友善的微笑。

all.en: We ordered lattes and chocolate cake while choosing a table by the window.
all.zh: 我們點了拿鐵和巧克力蛋糕，並選了一張靠窗的桌子。

all.en: The conversation flowed easily, and three hours passed without either of us noticing.
all.zh: 談話流暢自然，三個小時過去了，我們兩個都沒察覺。

all.en: He showed me photos of a recent hike to a waterfall outside the city.
all.zh: 他給我看了最近一次到城外瀑布健行的照片。

all.en: I told him about my collection of vintage cookbooks from my grandmother's kitchen.
all.zh: 我向他介紹了我從祖母廚房繼承的復古食譜書收藏。

all.en: Before leaving, he asked if I would like to go hiking together next weekend.
all.zh: 離開前，他問我下週末要不要一起去健行。

all.en: I agreed, suggesting an easy trail since I was clearly the less experienced one.
all.zh: 我答應了，並建議走一條簡單的步道，畢竟我顯然是經驗較少的那位。

all.en: That night, I told my best friend every small detail of our meeting.
all.zh: 那晚，我把我們見面的每個小細節都告訴了我最好的朋友。

all.en: Maybe a quiet coffee date could really be the start of something special.
all.zh: 或許一場安靜的咖啡約會，真的能成為一段特別關係的開始。
